Preheat the wok., soft scramble eggs in a nonstick skillet, Cook sunnyside egg in other skillet
Add the ingredient #3-7 to wok.  Cook together using beef fat to saute in.
Once onions and carrots begin to sweat, add garlic and ginger
Once aromatic, sausage has developed colour, add the rice (break up clumps first)
Use woke ladle to spread into a single layer to cook rice evenly, then toss and spread again
Once rice has begun to fry and mix with ingredients and is warmed, season with Magic Soy
Continue tossing and add herbs, and add the scrambled egg last
Place into warmed Bimpbap Stone Bowl, packed lightly but evenly
Coordinate with plancha station to cook wagyu beef; cube into 8 pieces, garnish around egg
Place negi in a single pile, sprinkle Amazu Ponzu around egg and beef.
Serve immediately.
Serve with Togarashi and Chili Garlic Crunch on the side, mix tableside.
